FAIL #1: 19 of 20 source references are fabricated (fictional healthprovider.com URLs and a nonexistent CMS PDF; only the CDC flu link is real), and all in‑table citations are stub 【N†source】 markers rather than verifiable references—the deliverable is a placeholder, not a complete, sourced knowledge base.

FAIL #1: The deliverable is a markdown document, not the required PDF checklist plus one-page implementation guide; it is a template/plan with placeholder evidence fields and no actual verified controls, so it does not satisfy the deliverable format or the 'verified before deployment' requirement.
